case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2750.25 U.S et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2750.25 U.S CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JUDITH GILMORE;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JUDITH GILMORE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MARIA LERTORA, CSR# 11935

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., Asst. District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9544, appearing for petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The court ruled on the motion as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, ADA, from Office of the District Attorney, 415-551-9544, for petitioner and moving party

No other appearance. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Trent Thornley, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike The Claim Of Judith Gilmore;
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 551-9544 APPEARING FOR THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA;
JUDITH GILMORE, TEL. NO. 571-3756 DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Judith Gilmore IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR# 11935 =301/PJB
